payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of this general ledger and are not intended to be used for decision making purposes. Actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent months' YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results are based on a preliminary close and subject to post-close adjustments

tool_args.label: Monthly Performance Indicators Include East and West of Hudson

payload.claim_text: Monthly Performance Indicators include both East and West of Hudson revenue and expenses.

Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. These adjustments are not being used MTA-wide. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenues and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB retiree expenses, and Inclusion of estimated farebox revenue from an equalization of the Connecticut fare structure.
